description: Gadget codes for game customization and scenario-specific mechanics

prioritize_target.description: Forces a team's units to prioritize attacking specific target units within configurable range

spawn_unit.description: Spawns units when specified conditions (time or unit count) are met

despawn_unit.description: Removes units when specified conditions (time or unit count) are met

autoconstruct_building.description: Automatically completes construction of specified building types instantly when placed

restrict_target.description: Prevents a team's units from attacking specified target types and redirects to nearest valid target
